name: Yucaipa Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Yucaipa-Calimesa Joint Unified School District (home-to-school, sports/activity charters)
recent_news: Long-tenured (~80+ years) sole home-to-school contractor for Yucaipa-Calimesa JUSD; no recent M&A or material news identified (2024-2026).
fit_notes: Small but iconic Inland Empire family operator (parent V Dudziak Inc) with an 80-year exclusive relationship to one district — classic succession/tuck-in profile. Size (~31 buses, ~27 employees) is below Summit's typical bite but valuable as a CA foothold; concentration risk on a single district contract is the key diligence item.

name: Harlow's School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Operates ~28 locations across ID (Craigmont, McCall), MT (Boulder, Kalispell, Libby, Manhattan, Missoula, Noxon, Stevensville, Shields Valley, Whitehall), ND (Bismarck, Dickinson, Hazen, Mandan, Rolette, Watford City, Jamestown, Williston), SD (Flandreau, Hill City, Sturgis, Canton, Vermillion, Sioux Valley), WA (Auburn, Spokane Valley), NE (Elkhorn)
recent_news: Active growth platform with affiliated Harlow's Bus & Truck Sales (Bismarck) dealership and Harlow's Trailways charter line; SVP Jacob Iverson featured in School Bus Fleet leadership coverage. No public sale process identified.
fit_notes: Highly attractive 2nd-gen family platform across ID/MT/ND/SD/WA/NE — by far the largest independent in the Northern Plains/Inland Northwest with deep district relationships and an in-house bus dealership. Geography is outside Summit's current core but represents a true regional consolidator acquisition; succession risk is low (active 2nd-gen owners + bench depth), so this is more of a strategic platform/JV target than an opportunistic tuck-in.

name: School Tyme Transportation
owner_or_parent: unknown (possibly related/co-located with United Limo & Car Service of Somerset; lead exec listed as Robert Kerr)
districts_or_customers: Central NJ school districts (Somerset County area); specific contracts not publicly disclosed
recent_news: No press, M&A activity, or litigation identified in 2024-2026. Listed on Manta as related to 'George Dapper, Inc.' and co-located near United Limo & Car Service in Somerset — relationship not publicly confirmed.
fit_notes: NJ mid-size operator (USDOT shows 80 power units / 77 drivers) sized in Summit's sweet spot, in a strong NJ market. Big information gap: ownership, district concentration, and the United Limo / George Dapper relationships need to be diligenced before approach. LinkedIn '2-10 employees' conflicts with the 250-employee figure — corporate structure may be split across affiliated entities.

name: Ycn School Transportation
districts_or_customers: Norwood-area / Greater Boston: historically ~1,200 students across ~90 schools in 29 MA towns; MBTA THE RIDE paratransit via JV with Thompson Transit
recent_news: Sold to National Express Corporation in March 2012 (Shields & Company advised sellers); JV with Thompson Transit (THE RIDE) included in deal. Continues operating under YCN/JSC branding from 19 Vernon St, Norwood.
fit_notes: NOT a private/independent target — already owned by National Express (now part of Mobico Group plc) since 2012. Would only become available via a National Express MA portfolio carve-out; deprioritize unless Summit hears of a divestiture.

name: Toms River Sch Trnsprtn Assn
owner_or_parent: NJEA/NEA local affiliate (labor union representing district transportation employees)
principals: Steve Graf (President of the employees' association/local, per source list)
districts_or_customers: Members are bus drivers and ESPs employed by Toms River Regional School District; the district itself operates the buses in-house
recent_news: Active NJEA-affiliated local union (TRSTA); featured by NJEA for member events. No M&A relevance.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFIED — this is the NJEA-affiliated labor union for in-district transportation employees of Toms River Regional School District, NOT a private school-bus contractor. Not acquirable; should be removed from the target list.
